deposit.title: Deposit Required
deposit.hint: This deposit secures your reservation and will be applied to your bill or refunded if you cancel in advance.

methods.title: Choose Payment Method
methods.hint: Open the payment page in a new tab. After paying, return here and click “I've Completed Payment”.

confirm.text: After completing your payment, click the button below:
confirm.hint: Your reservation will be confirmed once the restaurant verifies the payment.

error.selectMethod: Please click a payment method first to complete your payment.
